message:
test(genome): add edge case tests for overlay resolution

- loadRoot no-op when rootDir not set
- removeAgent on overlay re-exposes root agent
- removeAgent throws for root-only agents
- root agent deleted between sessions disappears from resolution
- addAgent with root-matching name bumps version above root's
- learn.integration.test.ts passes rootDir to Genome constructor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
